api/habitat-api.title: Habitat API
api/habitat-api.description: Welcome to the Habitat API reference! We are currently under development and our API may make breaking changes without notice. Stay tuned @habitat.network on Bluesky and habitat.leaflet.pub for formal releases.

api/network-habitat-internal-notify-of-u.title: network.habitat.internal.notifyOfUpdate
api/network-habitat-internal-notify-of-u.description: Notify another DID that there is an update for them on the fiven record.

api/network-habitat-permissions-add-perm.title: network.habitat.permissions.addPermission
api/network-habitat-permissions-add-perm.description: Grant read permission to a user for a specific lexicon.

api/network-habitat-permissions-remove-p.title: network.habitat.permissions.removePermission
api/network-habitat-permissions-remove-p.description: Revoke read permission from a user for a specific lexicon.

api/network-habitat-repo-delete-record.title: network.habitat.repo.deleteRecord
api/network-habitat-repo-delete-record.description: Delete a repository record, or ensure it doesn't exist. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

api/network-habitat-repo-put-record.title: network.habitat.repo.putRecord
api/network-habitat-repo-put-record.description: Write a repository record, creating or updating it as needed.

api/network-habitat-repo-upload-blob.title: network.habitat.repo.uploadBlob
api/network-habitat-repo-upload-blob.description: Upload a new blob, to be referenced from a repository record. The blob will be deleted if it is not referenced within a time window (eg, minutes). Blob restrictions (mimetype, size, etc) are enforced when the reference is created. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.
